samples.text: A hungry animal looks for food. Is this expected based on common sense?
An animal that is hungry searches for food. Does this match everyday common sense?
A famished creature seeks nourishment. Is this expected based on common sense?
Hunger drives food-seeking. The animal is hungry, so it looks for food. Is the described situation expected based on common sense?
A hungry animal looks for food. Someone left the door open earlier. Is this expected based on common sense?
